extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AERT Wout won the 10.1km San Benedetto time trial by 6 seconds over KÜNG Stefan, while POGAČAR Tadej secured overall by 1:03.
tactical_patterns: VAN AERT started late when wind conditions had settled, potentially gaining 6-second margin over earlier KÜNG ride.
GANNA Filippo's dominance broken suggests specialized short TT power now rivals sustained diesel engine in sub-11km efforts.
POGAČAR rode conservatively to fourth place, 1-second behind GANNA, indicating GC management rather than stage-hunting once lead secure.

rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: bookended race with Stage 1 and Stage 7 wins, showing peaking form strategy across week-long stage race
rider_signals.KÜNG Stefan: positive: beat reigning world champion GANNA by 5 seconds, confirming European champion credentials translate to short explosive efforts
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: negative: failed to defend prior-year Tirreno TT win, losing by 11 seconds suggests short punchy formats less suited than sustained power
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: fourth place just 1-second behind GANNA reveals elite TT form while already announcing need for rest
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: neutral: third overall at 3:57 confirms GC podium without contesting stage win
rider_signals.BETTIOL Alberto: neutral: his previous course record obliterated by KÜNG, indicating generational improvement in TT speeds
